title: TelemedicineAppointment
description: The Telehealth Appointment endpoint is an extension of the existing Appointment endpoint.

sent_patient_email.description: Whether a confirmation email was sent to the Patient or not

appointment.description: The Appointment related to the Telehealth Appointment, analagous to the /api/appointments resource id
appointment.title: Appointment

created_at.description: UTC Timestamp for when the Telehealth Appointment was created
created_at.title: Created at

updated_at.description: UTC Timestamp for when the Telehealth Appointment was updated
updated_at.title: Updated at

overlapping_duration.description: The duration that counts only if patient and doctor are in the video room
overlapping_duration.title: Overlapping duration

duration.description: Length of an appointment in minutes
duration.title: Duration

telehealth_url.description: URL used to access Telehealth Appointment
telehealth_url.title: Telehealth url
